summary.text: This instrument is an OSMRE form deed of trust; vesting is held by the Grantor whose name is left blank on the form and is not the policy vested owner.

citations.snippet: MORTGAGE OR DEED OF TRUST between the Grantor, Office of Surface Mining Reclamation and Enforcement Trustee, and the United States of America Beneficiary.

gaps: Grantor name is blank on the form.

summary.text: No legal description is provided on the form; obtain the metes-and-bounds or platted description from the recorded vesting deed.

gaps: Legal description blank on the form.

summary.text: The form establishes one recorded link: a deed of trust from the Grantor to the Office of Surface Mining Reclamation and Enforcement as Trustee for the United States of America as Beneficiary; cite Book and Page on recording.

citations.snippet: MORTGAGE OR DEED OF TRUST between the Grantor, Office of Surface Mining Reclamation and Enforcement Trustee, and the United States of America Beneficiary.

gaps: No prior chain links extracted; obtain back-title.

summary.text: An OSMRE first-priority deed of trust is open against the Real Property; treat the lien as open with no release reference until satisfied by the Grantor.

citations.snippet: A first mortgage, first deed of trust or first-lien security granting OSM a security interest in the Real Property described below.

gaps: Original amount, recorded date, and Book/Page are blank on the form.

summary.text: No easements or restrictions appear in the extracted form; verify against the recorded vesting deed and any conservation overlays.
Schedule B-I should require execution, notarization, and recordation of the OSMRE deed of trust and release of any senior liens before policy issuance.

citations.snippet: OSMRE deed of trust to be executed and recorded

gaps: Form has not yet been executed or recorded.

summary.text: Standard ALTA exceptions apply and the OSMRE deed of trust should appear as a special exception once recorded.

gaps: No Schedule B-II exceptions extracted from the form.

summary.text: The form imposes a tax-payment covenant but no specific tax year or amount is stated; obtain a current tax certificate and a survey of the Real Property.

gaps: No tax year or tax amount specified.

overall_summary.text: Material issues: this is an unexecuted OSMRE deed-of-trust form with blanks for grantor, property, and amount; execution, recordation, and back-title research are required before any policy can issue.

citations.snippet: OSMRE deed of trust between Grantor, Trustee, and Beneficiary

open_questions_for_client: Complete the grantor, property description, amount, county, and recording references on the form.
Provide the recorded vesting deed for back-title research.
Provide a current survey of the Real Property.
